use_codes.desc: AMYVID IS A RADIOACTIVE DIAGNOSTIC AGENT FOR POSITRON EMISSION TOMOGRAPHY (PET) IMAGING OF THE BRAIN TO ESTIMATE BETA-AMYLOID NEURITIC PLAQUE DENSITY IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH COGNITIVE IMPAIRMENT
